headline: The Bull Case For PACCAR (PCAR) Could Change Following JP Morgan’s Upgrade Amid Diverging Analyst Views - Learn Why
summary: Recently, JP Morgan upgraded PACCAR's rating from Neutral to Overweight, while other brokers such as Citigroup and Wells Fargo maintained or initiated more conservative views on the stock. This shift highlights a growing divergence in analyst opinion, with JP Morgan expressing higher confidence in PACCAR’s outlook than several of its peers. We’ll now examine how JP Morgan’s more optimistic stance could influence PACCAR’s existing investment narrative around regulation, technology, and...
